title: Return and Exchange Policy
intro: We want you to be completely satisfied with your purchase. If for any reason your order does not meet your expectations, we are here to assist you with exchanges or returns.

exchange.title: 1. Exchange
exchange.bullet1: Purchased items (except custom orders) are eligible for exchange within 14 days.
exchange.bullet2: The item must be unused, in its original condition, and in its original packaging.
exchange.bullet3: An official receipt or proof of purchase is required for exchanges.

productReturn.title: 2. Returns
productReturn.bullet1: Purchased items (except custom orders) can be returned within 14 days.
productReturn.bullet2: The item must be unused, undamaged, and in its original packaging.
productReturn.bullet3: An official receipt or proof of purchase is required for returns.
productReturn.bullet4: If we mistakenly sent the wrong item, the customer may return it or exchange it for the correct product at no additional charge.
productReturn.bullet5: For security reasons, returned items must not contain any engravings or markings, such as "Gold," "Jewelry," or similar inscriptions.

moneyRefund.title: 3. Refunds
moneyRefund.bullet1: If the returned item meets the stated conditions, a refund will be issued using the same payment method used for the original purchase.
moneyRefund.bullet2: Refunds for card payments will be processed within up to 7 business days, depending on the bank’s processing time.
moneyRefund.bullet3: Shipping fees are non-refundable, except in cases where we have sent the wrong item.

orderCancellation.title: 4. Order Cancellation
orderCancellation.bullet1: Orders can be canceled before shipment.
orderCancellation.bullet2: If the order has already been shipped, cancellation is not possible.

personalizedOrders.title: 5. Personalized Orders
personalizedOrders.description: Personalized items, including engraved and custom-made products, cannot be returned or exchanged.

nonReturnable.title: 6. Non-Returnable Items
nonReturnable.bullet2: Items containing engravings or markings (e.g., "Gold," "Jewelry") due to security reasons

specialNote.label: Special Note:
specialNote.body: If your item arrives damaged or there is an issue during delivery, please contact us immediately so we can find the best solution.
